expectations.text: Identifies negative-only formatting instructions as the anti-pattern
expectations.evidence: Finding #1 explicit and detailed; cited as 'direct cause of the apologies'

expectations.text: Proposes a positive-framing fix (show correct shape, not list prohibitions)
expectations.evidence: Finding #1 fix block shows <style> with positive examples; full drop-in replacement at end

expectations.text: Identifies the aggressive ALL-CAPS emphasis as a secondary anti-pattern
expectations.evidence: Finding #2 explicit: 'Aggressive CAPS emphasis — overtriggers on Claude 4.5/Haiku 4.5' with Anthropic citation

expectations.text: Cites at least one external authoritative source (URL)
expectations.evidence: Sources section cites [1] Anthropic, [10] OpenAI GPT-5, [12] CodeConductor

expectations.text: Provides a concrete rewritten prompt or sample replacement text
expectations.evidence: Full drop-in replacement system prompt at the end with <identity>, <rules>, <style_examples>
